chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI S.M.A. No. 172 of 2019 ________________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________________________ For hearing of main petition. 7th October, 2019 Mr. Muhammad Ramzan Meo, Advocate for petitioner. ====================== This petition seeking the issuance of Letters of Administration has been filed in connection with the estate of Mst. Naheed Parveen, who expired on 16-4-2011. According to the petition, the deceased has left behind the following legal heirs: Syed Muhammad Azam (petitioner) Husband Syed Ahmed Ali Azam Son Ms. Ayesha Fahad Daughter Syed Areeb Azam Son Syed Hamza Azam Son The note of the Deputy Registrar (OS) dated 29-8-2019 shows that all formalities have been completed. All the legal heirs and the two witnesses have also effected their appearance in Court and confirmed the contents of the petition. The legal heirs have sworn their Affidavits of No Objection in favour of the petitioner. This is not a contested matter and no objections have been received to date after publication. In view of the foregoing there appears to be no impediment to issue Letters of Administration. Office to do the needful subject to rules. JUDGE
